raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX I signed a contract for XXXX XXXX XXXX to pick my boat up on XXXX I provided pictures of the boat and a description ( year, make, model ) XXXX told me that they would do everything needed to get the boat transported to me. XXXXXXXX XXXX  showed up with a insuffient truck/trailer and were unable to move the boat because they didnt want to remove the radar arch, even after XXXX assured me their movers could do it as they are in the business of moving boats. After more then a week of excuses as to why he couldnt get my boat moved, I have multiple text messages from him as evidence which can be provided upon request, I hired another company ( I have the invoice ) to move the boat in a timely manner. That company picked the boat up on XXXX. As per the document I signed with XXXX XXXX I am entitled to a refund because they never scheduled a date, please see attached " confimationorder ( 1 ) '' " Deposit is refundable if for whatever reason said customer chooses to cancel the shipment of their vehicle BEFORE they are scheduled with a carrier '' I disputed the charge on XXXX on XXXX AND XXXX Bestbuy Citibank sent me letters saying the dispute was decided in my favor then on XXXX they rebilled my credit card for the {$1200.00} and I am unable to dispute this charge again.
